# DriftPatch

This repo wraps Shopify Polaris web components in React. Polaris ships an unversioned CDN bundle (`https://cdn.shopify.com/shopifycloud/polaris.js`) — when Shopify adds a new attribute or prop to a custom element, our wrappers need to expose it. [DriftPatch](https://github.com/Jaqito/driftpatch) automates that.

## Files

- `driftpatch.skill.md` — per-repo configuration (provider mappings, validation commands, patch policy). Generated by `driftpatch init`, hand-tunable.
- `.github/workflows/driftpatch.yml` — GitHub Action that runs DriftPatch against a known-good Polaris baseline on demand.
- `.driftpatch/` (gitignored) — local artifacts: `proposed.patch`, `patch-plan.json`, etc.

## Required secret

Set `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` as a repo secret (Settings → Secrets and variables → Actions).

## Manual trigger

Actions tab → DriftPatch → Run workflow:

- **`from_sha`** — previous Polaris bundle SHA. Defaults to a known-good baseline. After a PR merges, update the default to the new "current" SHA so the next run only shows newer changes.
- **`open_pr`** — `false` (default) just uploads `proposed.patch` as an artifact. `true` opens a PR.
- **`model`** — `claude-sonnet-4-6` is fine for testing. `claude-opus-4-7` for higher fidelity.

## Local

```sh
# Install + build DriftPatch (assumes it's at ../driftpatch)
cd ../driftpatch && pnpm install && pnpm -r build

# From this repo:
node ../driftpatch/packages/cli/dist/cli.js run \
  --provider polaris \
  --from 913ce26d86e1755e5b8c29606465c88c2fccf691 --to current \
  --repo . \
  --skill driftpatch.skill.md \
  --patch --validate --repair \
  --model claude-sonnet-4-6 \
  --allow-dirty
```

Add `--pr` to actually push a branch + open a PR.
